title: Flickr Uploadr 3.0
body: [![Flickr Uploadr 3.0](http://farm3.static.flickr.com/2089/2054070379_769dfe0d57_m.jpg)](http://www.flickr.com/photos/diluvi/2054070379/)We have a new version of this practical tool that [Flickr](/category/web-20/flickr/ "Other posts about Flickr") has to upload our photos from our Windows or Apple OSX. It is still a beta version, so it is not 100% reliable, but it offers us much more functionality than previous versions since before uploading the photos we can put all the information (title, description, tags, properties or add to a specific album). To download the tool you can go to the forum that Flickr created for this [here](http://flickr.com/help/forum/59804 "Download Flickr Uploadr 3.0").
